text.content:
Blood Sorcery Rituals — Level 2

Warding Circle vs Ghouls

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Blood Sorcery | Time: 30 minutes

Ingredients: Vitae traced in a circle, salt

Creates an invisible circle on the ground that no ghoul can willingly cross. Ghouls who attempt to cross suffer aggravated damage. Lasts until the next sunrise.

Deflection of Wooden Doom

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Blood Sorcery | Time: 1 hour

Ingredients: Wood shavings dissolved in vitae, consumed

Enchants the caster's body so that the first wooden stake that strikes them during the night shatters harmlessly on contact. Single use per casting.

Extinguish

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Blood Sorcery | Time: Instant (1 turn ritual action)

Ingredients: A vial of water mixed with ash

Instantly douses all mundane fires within a certain radius. Supernatural fires resist but are reduced. Useful against frenzy triggers.

Eyes of Babel

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Blood Sorcery | Time: 30 minutes

Ingredients: A page from a foreign language text, burned and mixed with vitae

Allows the caster to understand and speak any human language for the remainder of the night. Does not grant literacy.

Illuminate the Trail of Prey

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Blood Sorcery | Time: 15 minutes

Ingredients: A personal possession of the target

By casting this ritual over an object belonging to a person, the caster can see ghostly footprints tracing the owner's recent path. Tracks last until sunrise.

Truth of Blood

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Blood Sorcery vs Composure + Subterfuge | Time: 5 minutes

Ingredients: A drop of vitae applied to the subject's lips

By anointing a subject's lips with vitae, the caster compels them to speak only the truth for the next few minutes. Supernaturals may resist.
